relationship_to_target_domain.required_comparison: Report synthetic results separately from real podcast and audiobook cells.
relationship_to_target_domain.reason: Synthetic speech is controlled and reproducible, but it does not represent speaker, room, mastering, overlap, or spontaneous-speech variation in the target domain.

tts_candidates.model: installed de-DE system voice selected and captured per run
tts_candidates.integration: narrow Swift-to-C ABI called from Rust
tts_candidates.license: Apple platform API and installed system voice terms
tts_candidates.decision_after_pilot: Retain as the deterministic platform baseline even if an open model wins product selection.

tts_candidates.integration: pinned Python reference runner; direct repository-owned MLX boundary evaluated after measurements
tts_candidates.license: MIT runtime; Apache-2.0 model artifact; every file is byte-counted and SHA-256 pinned in spikes/qwen3-tts-mlx-reference/model-manifest.json
tts_candidates.decision_after_pilot: Compare accepting mlx-audio with owning only the required Qwen3-TTS path directly over official MLX.

tts_candidates.integration: pinned Python reference runner; direct repository-owned MLX boundary considered only if the model materially outperforms the primary candidate
tts_candidates.license: MIT runtime and upstream model family; converted artifact license and revision must be verified before execution
tts_candidates.decision_after_pilot: Advance only if intelligibility, prosody, or operational evidence adds value beyond Qwen3-TTS and the system baseline.

tts_candidates.integration: provider API reference runner with credentials supplied only through the environment
tts_candidates.source_revision: hosted-service-observed-2026-07-20; immutable provider snapshot not exposed
tts_candidates.license: Alibaba Cloud service terms; no local model weights
tts_candidates.decision_after_pilot: Use as an English provider-voice quality ceiling; do not infer German or local-model quality from its score.

external_evidence.scope: Provider-selected voices in the provider-voice arena; this is not German-language or local-runtime evidence.

execution_policy.matrix: Every materialized TTS candidate is run for each declared locale and transcribed by every ASR backend using identical digest-checked normalized PCM.

metrics.diagnosis: Attribute a roundtrip error to TTS, ASR, or unresolved only after listening to the generated audio and comparing the same audio across ASR backends.

exit_criteria: All source text and model artifacts are revision- and digest-pinned before measured execution.
The Apple system baseline completes a Rust-owned synthesis lifecycle including cancellation and generated-audio ownership.
Qwen3-TTS completes the same German passage set through the pinned mlx-audio reference runner.
All generated PCM is passed unchanged to all four ASR backends.
Results separate lexical content errors from punctuation and capitalization differences.
At least one blinded pronunciation and prosody review is recorded per candidate.
The evidence supports a written dependency decision: retain mlx-audio, build a narrow direct official-MLX adapter, or stop the candidate.
